label: FACIS DSP — Error Handling
info:
Catches uncaught errors from any DSP tab, emits a structured JSON log line
to stderr (visible in `kubectl logs`), and increments the
facis_dsp_transfer_errors_total counter so /dsp/metrics surfaces them.

DSP is request/response — there is no Kafka DLQ for connector errors
(the SFTP flow's DLQ is a separate concern at sftp.ingest.dlq).

name: structured log + metric
